info.name: Paragon Proxy API
info.description:
The Proxy API allows you to directly access any of the third-party provider's API methods on behalf of your Connected Users. Along with Workflows, the Proxy API is one of two primary ways to build integrations with Paragon. The Proxy API accepts requests with body contents specified as application/json and supports any HTTP verb including GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, and DELETE.

Contact Support:
 Name: Paragon

item.name: Paragon Proxy GET request to integration

variable.description: (Required) Your Paragon Project ID.
(Required) The type of integration to proxy the request to (e.g., salesforce, hubspot, slack).
(Required) The API path of the third-party provider to send the request to.

request.description: Send a GET request to a third-party integration API on behalf of a Connected User. The request is proxied through Paragon to the integration provider.

response.name: Successful proxy response from the integration provider.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Unauthorized. Invalid or missing Paragon User Token.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Integration not found or not enabled for the user.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: Rate limit exceeded.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
